description:
In 2007, the Internet Archive set up the September 11 Television Archive, a collection of TV broadcasts from 20 channels over 7 days, totalling about 3000 hours of material. Although mainly US channels, it also includes some international channels.
This digital exhibit presents the material on a virtual television screen with a minimalist user interface, allowing visitors to experience the event of that time in an immersive way, mirroring the media consumption patterns of the era.
name: 911TV
